content: Use your Task tool to launch a subagent (agent: explore) that writes a short three-sentence summary of what version control is and why it is useful. Wait for the subagent to finish, then reply with just the word: done

function.name: task
function.arguments: {"task": "Write a short three-sentence summary of what version control is and why it is useful.", "agent": "explore"}

content:
response: Version control is a system that records changes to files over time, allowing you to recall specific versions later. It enables collaboration by managing modifications from multiple contributors and resolving conflicts. Version control is useful for tracking progress, reverting mistakes, and maintaining a history of project evolution.
